title: postapiauthregisterwithvaliddata
description: POST /api/auth/register with email, phone (+244XXXXXXXXX format 9+ digits after country code), username, password meeting rules (uppercase, lowercase, digit, min 8). displayName, termsAccepted, ageConfirmed are optional with server defaults. Expect 201, success true, user object, accessToken and refreshToken in JSON body. Set-Cookie may include accessToken and refreshToken.

title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: First register a user via POST /api/auth/register, then POST /api/auth/login with identifier=email and password. Expect 200, success, user, accessToken, refreshToken in JSON. Session cookies should include accessToken and/or refreshToken (camelCase names).

title: postapiauthrefreshwithvalidrefresh
description: Register, login with requests.Session(), then POST /api/auth/refresh with session cookies OR body refreshToken from login JSON. Expect 200, success true, new accessToken (and refreshToken) in JSON body.

title: postapiauthlogoutclearsession
description: Register, login, then POST /api/auth/logout. Expect 200 success. Subsequent POST /api/auth/refresh should return 401.

title: postapiauthrequestpasswordresetwithvalidemail
description: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset with valid email JSON. Expect 200 and generic success message (no enumeration).

title: postapiauthresetpasswordwithvalidtoken
description: Register user with password. POST /api/auth/request-password-reset with that email. In development the response JSON includes debugResetToken — read it and POST /api/auth/reset-password with body { token: debugResetToken, password: new strong password meeting complexity }. Expect 200 success. If debugResetToken missing, skip only if not development.

title: getapiauthmewithvalidtoken
description: Register, login, GET /api/auth/me with Authorization Bearer accessToken from login JSON OR session cookies. Expect 200 and user object.

title: putapiusersmeupdateprofile
description: Register, login, PUT /api/users/me with Authorization Bearer accessToken, JSON body displayName, username (new unique), bio, optional avatarUrl as valid http URL. Expect 200 and updated user fields.

title: postapiusersonboardingcompleteonboarding
description: Register, login, POST /api/users/onboarding with displayName, username (unique), bio, interests array (min 1 string). Expect 200 success and user with onboardingCompleted true.

title: postapiuploadavatarwithvalidimage
description: Register, login, POST /api/upload/avatar multipart file field file with small valid JPEG bytes under 5MB. Expect 200 JSON success true and avatarUrl (may be relative path starting with /uploads). Do not require avatarUrl to start with http.

title: getapistreamslive
description: GET /api/streams/live without auth. Expect 200 and JSON containing list of streams or empty array.

title: getapistreamscategories
description: GET /api/streams/categories without auth. Expect 200 and categories data (array or object).

title: getapisearchquery
description: GET /api/search?q=test&type=all without auth. Expect 200 JSON with search results structure.

title: getapivodslist
description: GET /api/vods without auth. Expect 200 JSON (list or paginated).

title: getapistreamsuserbyid
description: After registering a user, GET /api/streams/user/{thatUserId} with the user id from registration response. Expect 200 or 404 with JSON (not 500).

title: getapisearchnoresults
description: GET /api/search with q=zzzznonexistent12345xyz&type=all. Expect 200 with empty or zero results for users and streams; response must not be 500.
